Actions.Text: REFERRED TO ETHICS AND INTERNAL GOVERNANCE

Title: Prohibits the use of confidential information in predictive markets
Summary: Prohibits members of the legislature and legislative employees from using confidential or non-public information to personally profit or assist another person in personally profiting in predictive markets.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public officers law, in relation to prohibiting the use of confidential information in predictive markets
